description: Robohash generates deterministic avatar-style images from arbitrary text strings. It can return robots, monsters, cats, and other image sets based on the requested URL pattern.
summary: robohash.org exposes one public HTTP image-generation interface at `https://robohash.org/{text}` with URL parameters for format, set, size, background, and related options; no auth, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
